functions.name: showMessage
functions.description: Show a localized message using the browser notification box. Optionally target a specific tab by id.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Object with a Fluent l10n ID.

parameters.name: tabId
parameters.description: Target tab id. Defaults to active tab.

functions.name: hideMessage
functions.description: Hide the IPP notification for the given tab (or active tab by default). No-op if not present.

parameters.name: tabId
parameters.description: Target tab id. Defaults to active tab.

functions.name: getNotifiedDomains
functions.description: Return the list of base domains for which a notification was already shown.

functions.name: addNotifiedDomain
functions.description: Add a base domain to the suppression list (no-op if present).

functions.name: isIPPActive
functions.description: Return whether IPP connection is active.

functions.name: getRegion
functions.description: Return the user's home region as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (uppercase), or null if unknown.

functions.name: getTabBreakagesUrl
functions.description: Return the URL to fetch the base tab breakages from (pref: extensions.ippactivator.tabBreakagesUrl). Empty string means use the built-in file.

functions.name: getWebRequestBreakagesUrl
functions.description: Return the URL to fetch the base webRequest breakages from (pref: extensions.ippactivator.webrequestBreakagesUrl). Empty string means use the built-in file.

functions.name: getBaseDomainFromURL
functions.description: Return both the eTLD+1 (baseDomain) and full host for the given URL.

functions.name: hasExclusion
functions.description: Return true if this URL has ipp-vpn permission set to DENY.

events.name: onIPPActivated
events.description: Fired when IPProtectionService dispatches 'IPProtectionService:Started'. The listener receives the current active state.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Whether the IPP connection is currently active.

events.name: onIPPExceptionsChanged
events.description: Fired when the ipp-vpn permission changes.

events.name: onRegionChanged
events.description: Fired when the user's home region changes (observer on 'browser-region-updated'). The listener receives the new region.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: The new home region as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (uppercase), or null if unknown.
